name: §6Hound
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Strength: §c40
§7Bonus Attack Speed: §e[Bonus Attack Speed]%
§7Ferocity: §c[Ferocity]
§7Speed: §f10

§6Scavenger
§7Gain §a+100 §7coins per monster kill

§6Finder
§7Increases the chance for monsters
§7to drop their armor by §a30%§7.

§6Pack Slayer
§7Gain §b1.5x §7Combat XP against §aWolves§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Beagle Hound Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aHound§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
